results.evidence: SKILL.md exists at plugins/specweave/skills/help/SKILL.md with proper YAML frontmatter (description, trigger phrases)
Skills are auto-discovered from filesystem — SKILL.md in skills/help/ IS the registration. 'help' keyword added to plugin.json
SKILL.md Section C organizes skills into 8 stages: Plan, Implement, Verify, Close, Sync, Explore, Create, Extend
Every skill in Section C has a one-liner description (e.g., '/sw:increment Plan a new feature, bug fix, or change')
Step 1 gathers stats via 'specweave analytics --since 30d --json' and 'specweave status --json'. Section A displays stats banner
Section B shows active increment context with progress and next actions when STATUS_JSON contains active increments
Step 2 checks INITIALIZED flag. If no .specweave/ dir, shows getting started with npm install, init, and docs link
